title: Annual report and accounts 2024-2025
body: "Infected Blood Compensation Authority’s annual report and accounts for the period ending 31 March 2025  Different formats  We understand that some people may need documents in different formats. If you would like to receive IBCA’s annual report and accounts in large print or another format, please let us know by calling 0141 726 2397, emailing enquiries@ibca.org.uk, or writing to PO Box 384, Newcastle upon Tyne, NE98 1XY. "
